seo_title: How to Maintain Weight Loss After Stopping GLP-1 Medications: A Protocol for Women Over 40
meta_description: Most women regain weight after stopping GLP-1 medications. This physician-reviewed protocol for women over 40 addresses the gut, muscle, and behavioral factors that determine maintenance success.
